name: TEC1-12706 Peltier module (40x40 mm, 12 V, 60 W)
role: active heat AND cool element under the aluminium folding block

name: BTS7960 IBT-2 H-bridge driver
role: bidirectional Peltier drive (PWM heat + reverse-polarity cool) for thermocycler.ino
notes: H-bridge needed for controlled cool; a bare IRLB8721 MOSFET (~$8) is the heat-only alternative

name: Arduino Uno R3
role: runs the anneal ramp, PID loop, drives the H-bridge, reads thermistor

name: 100K NTC 3950 thermistor (10-pack)
role: temperature feedback for the PID loop

name: 96-well aluminium PCR cooling block (0.2 mL)
role: even thermal mass holding the folding tubes on the Peltier

name: 12 V 30 A 360 W switching PSU
role: powers the Peltier + electronics
notes: a salvaged PC PSU 12V rail also works

name: CPU heatsink + 12 V fan
role: dumps the Peltier hot-side heat

name: IVYX Scientific Mini Gel Electrophoresis System (tank + integrated 35/50/100 V supply + combs)
role: fold-QC gel; the integrated 50/100 V supply meets the 60-90 V origami requirement
notes: the printed hardware/cad/gel_box.scad + a 60-90 V source is the ~$15 DIY alternative

name: Blue-LED transilluminator (470 nm)
role: visualize GelGreen/GelRed-stained bands (eye/skin-safe, no UV)

name: Mini vortex mixer
role: mix folding + silicification reactions

name: Mini benchtop centrifuge (7000 rpm)
role: spin-downs + PEG-precipitation purification of folded origami

name: Adjustable micropipette set (2-20, 20-200, 100-1000 uL) + tips
role: dispense uL volumes for all wet steps

name: Sous-vide immersion circulator (alternative folding bath)
role: isothermal / manual-step folding (Sobczak 2012); zero-electronics Path A
notes: replaces the Peltier build for robust isothermal designs

name: 3D-printed gel box + thermocycler collar + STM mount (PLA/PETG filament)
role: the parametric hardware/cad/*.scad parts
notes: ~50 g of filament across all three printed parts

name: Piezo buzzer disc 27 mm (15-pack) [STM]
role: cut into quadrants -> XYZ scanner (Berard/Open-STM)

name: Teensy 4.0 [STM]
role: real-time STM scan/feedback controller

name: LF356 JFET op-amp [STM]
role: transimpedance amp: pA-nA tunnelling current -> voltage
notes: 100 MOhm feedback resistor; OPA129 is the upgrade

name: M13mp18 single-stranded scaffold DNA (NEB N4040, 10 ug)
role: the scaffold strand the compiler threads (p7249, 7249 nt)
notes: ships to individuals w/ credit card; ~4-8 folds; tilibit p7249 (~$120) is origami-grade

name: Staple oligos as IDT oPool (~200 sequences, one tube)
role: the staple set; cheapest route for a first proof-of-fold
notes: addressable 25 nmol plate alternative ~$750 (staples_idt_plate.txt); compiler emits both

name: MgCl2 hexahydrate, ACS, 500 g
role: folding cation (12.5 mM Mg2+) + gel running buffer (~11 mM)

name: 50x TAE buffer concentrate, 1 L
role: folding + gel buffer (dilute to 1x)

name: Agarose, molecular-biology grade, 100 g
role: gel matrix (~2% for origami QC)

name: GelGreen nucleic-acid stain, 10000x, 0.5 mL
role: DNA-safe band stain (EtBr replacement; blue-light optimized)

name: DNA ladder (100 bp - 1 kb)
role: size marker lane on the gel

name: PEG-8000, 500 g
role: PEG-precipitation purification of folded origami (Stahl 2014)

name: 0.2 mL PCR 8-tube strips (~125)
role: folding-reaction vessels

name: Nuclease-free water, 1 L
role: all dilutions / buffers

name: TEOS (tetraethyl orthosilicate), 500 mL [hardening]
role: silica source for sol-gel hardening (Liu 2018)

name: APTES or TMAPS aminosilane (nucleator) [hardening]
role: cationic/amine nucleation layer on DNA before silica condensation
notes: APTES 100 mL; TMAPS (Gelest SIT8415.0) is the Liu-2018 default

name: Pt/Ir wire 90:10, 0.25 mm, 30 cm [STM]
role: hand-cut STM tip (~50 tips per length)

name: HOPG sample (grade B, 5x5x1 mm) [STM]
role: conductive test specimen whose atomic lattice the STM resolves
notes: the STM images HOPG atoms, NOT the origami (honest scope)
